name: Creme Bath Oil Soak
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and mix with corn oil. Let stand for one hour.
2. Mix eggs and stir gently.
3. Add all ingredients one at a time to a blender, starting with 1 cup of milk.
4. Beat at low speed until combined.
5. Turn off the blender and add the last 3/4 cup of milk without beating.
6. Stir and enjoy. Keep refrigerated for freshness. Shake and add half a cup to your tub. Makes 3 cups - enough for 6 baths.
